heroTitle: CliffRise is a way to give back to the rocks - every purchase supports the creation of new climbing routes.
causeP1: By choosing CliffRise chalk or any of our other products, you directly support the development of climbing areas in Bulgaria. Every purchase helps create new routes, maintain existing ones, and improve the places we all love to climb at.
causeP2: CliffRise is a way to give back to the rocks and the climbing community. Your support helps us keep moving forward, bring new ideas to life, and continue developing climbing in Bulgaria.
aboutUsP1: The guys behind the idea are well-known climbers in Bulgaria, with a long list of difficult ascents behind them.
aboutUsP2BeforeBoyko: United by their love for climbing and the desire to give something back to the community,
aboutUsP2AfterAlex: began working together in 2022, when they developed "The Cave" crag in Ribaritsa. Shortly after, alongside the many routes they established around Teteven, the idea for the CliffRise brand was born.

boykoLalov.name: Boyko Lalov
boykoLalov.title: Boyko Lalov

content.text: Boyko Lalov started climbing in 1996, when at the age of just 14 he joined the "Nepiast" caving club in Burgas. Not long after, his interest shifted toward rock climbing, with the cliffs near Aytos becoming his first serious training ground. Later, he trained under the guidance of Georgi Temelkov.

By the age of 16, he had already completed a significant number of alpine climbs in the Sliven Balkan Mountains, and in 1998 he competed for the first time in the Bulgarian National Sport Climbing Championship.
During his competitive career, Boyko became:

items: multiple-time Bulgarian and Balkan bouldering champion;
silver medalist in speed climbing at the European Youth Cup in Veliko Tarnovo;
9th place finisher at the 2000 Bouldering World Cup in Konnitsa, Greece.

content.text: Alongside competition climbing, he established himself as one of Bulgaria's strongest sport climbers, with more than 200 ascents graded 7c and harder, including:
He also achieved notable ascents in Spain, where in 2007 he climbed the iconic "Welcome to Tijuana" 8c in Rodellar, as well as "El Salto del Angel" 8b+.

His interests span nearly every climbing discipline - sport climbing, bouldering, trad climbing, and dry tooling. In 2011, he completed "Ali Babach" M13 in Bezhanovo, considered one of the hardest dry tooling routes in the world at the time. In bouldering, he has climbed up to grade 8b.

content.textBeforeLink: Over the years, Boyko has developed more than 100 climbing routes across Bulgaria. Since 2022, together with Alex Ianev, he has focused primarily on developing the climbing areas around Teteven and organizing the

boykoLalov.quote: Good climbing areas are built by communities, not individuals.

alexYanev.name: Alex Ianev
alexYanev.title: Alex Ianev

content.text: Alex Ianev had a natural love for mountains and outdoor activities. During his childhood he had spent most of his free time hiking and exploring the Bulgarian wilderness.

In 2004, at the age of 14 he started climbing in the oldest gym in Sofia - the one in Sofia University. It did not take long for him to realize that, as he says "climbing outdoors is the real deal, the gym just keeps you fit".
From then on he was mainly concentrated in climbing outdoors-both sport and traditional.
Some of his sport climbing achievements:

Apart from sport climbing Alex had done many traditional ascents in Bulgaria, and also the Italian Alps (mainly the Dolomites). In this period of his career he also summited Mont Blank (4792m) via route from Italy's side which included a mixture of ice and rock climbing as well as a lot of hiking.
Climbing trips are another chapter of Alex's career. Greece, Turkey, Spain, Austria, Germany are some of the places he had visited.
"Being in different countries helps compare grades, bolting and developing climbing areas as a whole."

content.textBeforeLink: This bring us to the current state of his climbing career. Alex has bolted more than 60 lines in the last 10 years. Since 2022 he has been working alongside Boyko Lalov in the Teteven area in Bulgaria, discovering and developing new climbing gems. They both dream big and last year they organized the first climbing festival in Bulgaria -

alexYanev.quote: Climbing is not a sport, it is a way of life

eventsSection.text: Teteven Climb brings together people who love climbing, movement, and time spent outdoors. Rock climbing, yoga, new connections, shared stories, and ideas - all surrounded by the beautiful nature of Teteven. The festival creates a space where the climbing community comes together naturally, with good vibes, shared projects, and the desire for more time on the rocks.

feedbacks.maniac: I love the chalk texture. I have very dry skin, so it's hard to find something that stays on my hands. I'm super happy to have found this chalk—it has everything I need and definitely boosts my confidence on the rock.
feedbacks.matey: If you want to take care of your climbing experience and make it with most pleasure, CliffRise is your way to do it, they offer quality climbing tape, clothing, varieties of climbing chalk and so on!
feedbacks.cvety: Not only is CliffRise the first brand that makes extra moist quality climbing chalk which saved my dry skin in the harsh winter, but also is the only one that has such a huge social impact. This is not just a chalk, it is an investment in the future of climbing.
feedbacks.xenia: CliffRise is the chalk that helps you send big time. It sticks perfectly to my dry skin while giving maximum grip on the wall. It's such a difference!
feedbacks.bat-dido: CliffRise is not a product, it's a passion and when there is passion, there is progress! Everything the team do is with heart and soul. Sustainable and with ideas, everything is made by climbers for climbers - from chalk, to merchandise… to creating new routes. Keep up the great work!

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions for Using the Online Store
termsAndConditions.intro: These Terms and Conditions govern the relationship between "SOLUTION 83" EOOD and users of the online store.
ordersText: Orders can be placed 24/7 through the site.
After a successful order, the customer receives confirmation by email.
deliveryText: Deliveries are made through Speedy courier service to an office or address specified by the customer when completing the order.

The delivery time is up to 2 business days for in-stock products, counted from order confirmation. Delays may occur during public holidays, busy periods, or circumstances beyond the merchant's control.
Delivery costs are calculated at checkout and are borne by the customer, unless otherwise stated.
The customer is required to inspect the shipment upon receipt. In case of visible damage or discrepancies, this must be noted with the courier when receiving the shipment.

withdrawalText.intro: Under the Consumer Protection Act, the customer has the right to withdraw from the placed order within 14 days from the date of receiving the goods, without giving a reason.
withdrawalText.requirementsIntro: For the return to be accepted, the products must be:
requirements: without damage, dirt, or compromised integrity;
with the original packaging, if any.
withdrawalText.returnCost: The cost of returning the goods is borne by the customer, except in cases of an incorrectly sent or defective product.
withdrawalText.refusal: The merchant reserves the right to refuse acceptance of returned goods when they do not meet the above conditions.
withdrawalText.refund: The amount for an approved return will be refunded using the same payment method used for the original payment, within 14 days after receiving and inspecting the returned product.

termsAndConditions.billingManagementTextBeforeLink: Payments, payment methods, and invoices can be managed through Stripe's secure customer
termsAndConditions.billingManagementNote: Access to the portal may require confirmation via email address.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy and Personal Data Protection
privacyPolicy.intro: This policy governs the processing of personal data when using the online store and website owned by "SOLUTION 83" EOOD.
privacyPolicy.administratorText: "SOLUTION 83" EOOD is a personal data controller within the meaning of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and the Personal Data Protection Act.
privacyPolicy.dataIntro: When using the site and online store, we may collect the following personal data:
dataItems: information sent through contact forms or email communication.
privacyPolicy.noPaymentData: We do not store bank card or payment instrument data.
privacyPolicy.stripeText: Online payments are processed through Stripe Payments Europe Ltd.
rightsItems: to file a complaint with the Commission for Personal Data Protection.
privacyPolicy.cookiesText: The site uses cookies for proper operation, analytics, and improving the user experience.

gdpr.title: Information about personal data processing under GDPR
gdpr.intro: By using this site, you agree that "SOLUTION 83" EOOD may process your personal data in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).
dataItems: technical information about the device and browser;
gdpr.rightsIntro: Under GDPR, you have the right:
rightsItems: to receive information about the stored data;
to file a complaint with a supervisory authority.
